title: FOREST GROVE HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE - 211info
text: WEST TUALITY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY FOREST GROVE HABITAT FOR HUMANITY RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells new and used donated building materials, furniture, appliances, and assorted goods at reduced costs. Accepts donations of building materials, appliances, furniture, electronics, home decor, and housewares. 3731 Pacific Avenue Forest Grove, OR 97116 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: ReStore: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Donations: Monday-Saturday 9am-4:30pm Email (503) 357-1201 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 357-1201 Restore Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information. FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Banks, Buxton, Cornelius, Forest Grove, Gales Creek, Gaston, Gales Creek, North Plains, and Timber SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line #57 Services: Donation Drop Off Points Donation Pickups Low Cost Building Materials/Supplies Thrift Shops Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - WEST TUALITY HABITAT FOR HUMANITY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CRITICAL HOME REPAIR PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
